ops.text:
RESULTS E31 + VERIFY (VERIFY-confirmed exactly, separate code path, zero discrepancies; $0, no model calls). VERDICT: position_effect = WEAK. Naive 2×10 χ²(9)=18.17 p=0.033 + a significant Cochran-Armitage DECLINE (steering front-loaded: decile-0 rate 0.171 → decile-7 0.084, 2.03×), BUT the effect is tiny (Cramér's V=0.067, r=-0.034) and the session-clustered bootstrap r-CI [-0.094, +0.033] STRADDLES ZERO — the naive χ² overstates by ignoring intra-session correlation. POSITION-PRIOR (E40's baseline-to-beat): train-fit per-decile rate → TEST-split AUC = 0.544 (CI [0.400, 0.640], includes 0.5). So E40's observed-future watcher has a LOW BAR (the "flat → lower bar" pre-registered read).

DESIGN INPUT for E40 (Wave 2): (1) the marginal position prior is near-chance (0.544) — E40 must clear a low bar, but a naive position feature won't help it much. (2) KEY: the flat aggregate HIDES opposing per-dimension gradients — users DIRECT EARLY (direction [largest steer class] mean pos 0.45, status_update 0.43) and CORRECT LATE (incorrect_change 0.55, unwanted_action 0.64, premature 0.66 — surfacing after Claude produces output). A CATEGORY-CONDITIONED position feature could exploit this even though the marginal prior can't — E40 should condition imminence on category, not just raw position. (3) Companion (decisions.parquet): clarification is even more front-loaded — 50.3% of AskUserQuestion rounds at turn ≤1, 70.3% by turn ≤3.

⚠️ TRAJECTORY FRAME COMPLETENESS (flag for E40 prep, not acted now): the frozen trajectory frame (db4c6914) uses origin paths AS STORED = 4014 turns / 522 steer / 127 sessions. Rewriting the legacy .cc-pushback mirror paths would resurrect ~547 sessions → 8523 turns / 1758 steer (~3.4x the steer signal). The analyst correctly did NOT rewrite (honoring the frozen frame). Since E40 is the FIRST arm to use the trajectory frame and hasn't run, BEFORE E40 dispatch consider fixing cc_steer/export.py's trajectory config to resolve legacy .cc-pushback paths + RE-FREEZE — a ~3.4x larger frame would materially improve E40's power (and E31's own CI, which was wide because the test split is only 260 turns/23 steer). Artifacts: ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E31/out/{results.json, report.md, demand_curve.csv/png, trajectory.parquet, reactions_11way.parquet}.
